_description: Tests 'first time each turn' tracking for Valiant. Plan: (1) Cast Shore Up on Heartfire Hero -> Valiant triggers, +1/+1 counter, hexproof, untap. (2) Cast Might of the Meek on Heartfire Hero -> Valiant must NOT trigger again (already targeted once this turn). (3) Cast Rabid Gnaw targeting Heartfire Hero -> still no Valiant. Attack with a big buffed Heartfire Hero; if it dies, 'deals damage equal to its power to each opponent' triggers using its current (projected) power. Common engine bugs: valiant firing on every targeted spell, dies-damage using base power instead of modified, or losing +1/+1 counter when removing the stat buff.
